dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Edward walks through the old district, drawn by a strange mix of curiosity and hope. The poster’s warm, whimsical design lingers in his mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: If this place really is hiring… it could help Mom. She’s been doing everything alone for too long.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Despite his exhaustion, there’s a spark in his eyes—a rare moment of optimism.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [He opens the café door. Soft, almost magical bells echo gently.]

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Ah! I sense curiosity—bright, swirling, lively! What a delightful visitor.

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: I saw your job posting. And… well, I want to see if this place could be a good opportunity.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Opportunity! A beautiful word. But your heart also hums with responsibility, does it not?

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: My family needs the support. Especially my mom. If I can help ease her load… I have to try.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Kit’s eyes soften, filled with a warm kind of understanding.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: A noble reason. You’ll find the Wish House welcomes noble hearts—and curious ones.
